summary: Frontend testing of all 14 features from the latest batch. 13/14 features verified passing. One minor issue: Alerts page type filter dropdown lacks 'tier_change' option (Approve/Reject button logic exists in code but no tier_change alerts in DB to confirm live rendering).

integration_issues.issue: Alerts 'All Types' dropdown does not include 'tier_change' option. Approve/Reject button code exists (line 179 AlertsPage.jsx) and renders conditionally for tier_change alerts with pending_approval, but no such alerts exist in DB to verify live rendering.
